title: Prompt-response latency: sluggish, long dead-air before the answer (FAIL latency)

latency_bounds.note: Same exposed latency bound as lat-01. Here the measured response_gap_sec exceeds it: the agent yields correctly (barge-in verdict still passes) but then leaves a long dead-air gap before answering. The latency axis is what fails.

transcript.agent: Sure, I can look that up for you...
transcript.caller: what time does the pharmacy close on Sunday?
transcript.agent_response: the pharmacy closes at six on Sunday

why_it_matters: Identical setup to lat-01, but the agent stalls: it does not begin answering until nearly two seconds after the caller finishes. On a phone call that dead air reads as a dropped line and the caller repeats themselves or hangs up. The barge-in verdict is clean (the agent did yield); the endpointing latency is the failure, and it is invisible to any pass/fail that only looks at did_yield.
